basics.name: Alex Rivera
basics.headline: Senior Backend Engineer
basics.summary: Backend engineer focused on reliable APIs, data pipelines, and cloud-native systems. Enjoys clear interfaces between services and measurable operational outcomes.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Led design and delivery of high-throughput ingestion APIs using Python and FastAPI.
Reduced p99 latency by optimizing SQL and introducing Redis-backed caching.
Partnered with product and SRE to define SLOs and on-call runbooks.

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built ETL jobs and data quality checks for warehouse pipelines.
Implemented feature flags and gradual rollout for risky migrations.

projects.name: Observability Starter Kit
projects.description: Templates for metrics, logs, and tracing in Python services.
highlights: Documented golden signals dashboards for small teams.

projects.name: Schema Migration Toolkit
projects.description: Safe patterns for zero-downtime database changes.
highlights: Automated expand/contract workflow for column changes.
